_warning: OPTIMIZED v2 - Better trade frequency + ATR-based SL. Still conservative for 6% trailing DD.

drawdown_guards._note: 6% TRAILING DD. Soft=reduce lot size | Critical=close all & halt | Hard=account blown (never reach)

spread_filter._note: Widened from 2.5/4.0 - FundedNext spreads can be 2-3 pips on majors

news_filter._note: Reduced from 30/30 to 15/15 for more trading opportunities

trailing_stop._note: Lowered from 30/20 - more realistic for M15 timeframe

breakeven._note: Lowered from 20 - trades can lock in profit earlier

caution_mode._note: When approaching DD limits, lot size is halved automatically

consistency_rule._note: No single day can be more than 40% of total profit for payout eligibility
